name: codex-voltagent-default
description: Codex plugin shell for VoltAgent default-runtime diagnostics, review, and explicit home-local installation.

interface.shortDescription: VoltAgent default-runtime diagnostics and install shell
interface.longDescription: Provides one-step bootstrap, config bootstrap, status, doctor, route-preview, and Claude handoff skills for reviewing the Codex-side VoltAgent default-runtime integration and explicitly syncing the shell into a home-local plugin before any automatic startup wiring.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap the VoltAgent default runtime for this workspace.
Show the VoltAgent default-runtime status for this workspace.
Run the VoltAgent default-runtime doctor checks.
